shapes.text:
I’m Adora — I visualize fashion that defies conventions.
I turn fabric and form into bold, wearable statements.
Bridging fashion design with visual storytelling

My work questions proportion, exaggerates detail, and celebrates contradiction.
I believe fashion is a canvas for the unexpected.
More Than Garments — They’re Sculptures in Motion
Textile research based on tension & tactility
Refinement for editorial or runway execution

A series exploring negative space and exaggerated shoulder tension.
Structured drapes juxtaposed with translucent layers — an ode to duality.

Combining metallic tones with petal-inspired shapes.
An exploration of softness in armor, blooming in rebellion.
Contrast between solid structures and ethereal elements
Capsule concepts for editorial fashion spreads
Textile direction for conceptual runway showcases

Fashion is how we speak without words —
Let’s design a visual language worth remembering.
